probation_levels.first_probation: Applied when GPA < 2.00 for the first semester
probation_levels.second_probation: Applied when GPA < 2.00 for the second consecutive semester
probation_levels.third_probation: Applied when GPA < 2.00 for the third consecutive semester

academic_standing.dismissal: A student is dismissed after receiving three consecutive academic warnings

graduation_requirements.max_study_duration_policy: Students failing to graduate within 1.5× the standard program duration may be dismissed unless granted an extension

conditions: No failed courses at the university or elsewhere
Completed at least 60% of credits at UPM

dismissal_policy.dropout: Student dismissed if they stop studying without authorized postponement
dismissal_policy.disciplinary_dismissal: May not re-enroll for 3 years after dismissal
dismissal_policy.max_absence: Dismissal if student exceeds allowed postponement (2 consecutive or 3 non-consecutive semesters)

withdrawal_policy.without_grade: Allowed before the beginning of the third week of the semester
withdrawal_policy.co_requisite_rule: Department approval required for withdrawal from co-requisite courses

re_enrollment.policy: Re-enrollment must occur within 4 semesters after dismissal; otherwise, treated as new admission

honor_list.policy: Students with excellent GPAs in both semesters of an academic year are listed on the undergraduate excellence list
